methods.String getMethod(): Gets the method associated with the request, for example "GET".
methods.Map getRequestHeaders(): Gets the headers associated with the request.
methods.Uri getUrl(): Gets the URL for which the resource request was made.
methods.boolean hasGesture(): Gets whether a gesture (such as a click) was associated with the request.
methods.boolean isForMainFrame(): Gets whether the request was made in order to fetch the main frame's document.
methods.boolean isRedirect(): Gets whether the request was a result of a server-side redirect.
